name: Heroic Contact Form
description: Self-hostable contact form. Drop the widget bundle on any CDN, deploy the single-tenant Lambda to your own AWS account, point the widget at it.

formId.description: Optional tag added to the email subject. Useful when one operator handles multiple landings; the Lambda does NOT route on this field.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of visible fields. Allowed: name, email, phone, message.

required.description: Comma-separated subset of fields that are required.

locale.description: Locale for built-in labels and validation messages.

theme.description: Visual variant matched to the host landing's appearance.

target.description: CSS selector of the mount node (e.g. '#contact-section'). Defaults to the script tag's parent.

honeypotName.description: Hidden field name used as a bot honeypot.

mode.description: Display mode. `inline` renders the form in place; `modal` renders a button with mail icon that opens a dialog containing the form. The dialog auto-closes after a successful submit.

triggerLabel.description: Label shown on the modal-mode trigger button. Defaults to a localized 'Contact us' string.

modalTitle.description: Title rendered in the modal header. Defaults to a localized 'Write us a message' string.
